name: Stock Splits Test
description: Test case for retrieving stock split history for a company through agent interaction

parts.text: Has Apple (AAPL) had any stock splits?

Here is the stock split history for Apple (AAPL):

Apple has had several stock splits over the years. Each split entry includes the ex-date (the date shareholders of record receive additional shares), the split ratio (e.g., 4-for-1 means each existing share became 4 shares), and the execution date.

Notable splits include Apple's most recent 4-for-1 split and earlier 7-for-1 and 2-for-1 splits. These splits increase the number of outstanding shares while proportionally reducing the per-share price, making shares more accessible to retail investors.

**Note:** This is read-only corporate action data. No orders were placed.
